action.reasoning: Observation: The success rate dropped to 0.044 with FullyObsWrapper. Analysis: FullyObsWrapper changes the observation to allocentric (full grid), which is much harder for the CNN to process than the egocentric view, as the agent has to learn its own position and map it to egocentric actions. To solve memory-dependent tasks (KeyCorridor, LockedRoom) while keeping the egocentric view, we need a recurrent policy. Decision: Revert to egocentric view, implement a proper Embedding-based CNN for the categorical image channels, and use RecurrentPPO from sb3-contrib to handle memory. I will train for 11M timesteps total.
